variables.aadValidation: [if(empty(parameters('allowedGroupObjectIds')), createObject('allowedAudiences', variables('resolvedAllowedAudiences')), createObject('allowedAudiences', variables('resolvedAllowedAudiences'), 'defaultAuthorizationPolicy', createObject('allowedPrincipals', createObject('groups', parameters('allowedGroupObjectIds'))), 'jwtClaimChecks', createObject('allowedGroups', parameters('allowedGroupObjectIds'))))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('eg-st-albaranes-{0}', parameters('environment')), 'blobcreated-to-extraccion-queue')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.ServiceBus/namespaces/queues', parameters('serviceBusNamespaceName'), parameters('queueName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ServiceBus/namespaces/queues', parameters('serviceBusNamespaceName'), parameters('queueName')), format('eg-st-albaranes-{0}', parameters('environment')), variables('serviceBusDataSenderRoleDefinitionId')))]

variables.bcMcpConnectionFailureQuery:
AppTraces
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(5m)
| extend props = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend message = tostring(Message)
| extend serverName = coalesce(tostring(props["mcp_server"]), tostring(props["dependency.target"]), '')
| where SeverityLevel >= 3
| where message has_any ('BC MCP', 'Business Central MCP', 'connection failed', 'connection lost')
    or serverName has 'bc-mcp'
| summarize FailureCount = count()
variables.agentProcessingP95Query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(15m)
| extend props = column_ifexists("Properties", dynamic({}))
| extend customDimensions = column_ifexists("CustomDimensions", dynamic({}))
| extend agentName = coalesce(
    tostring(customDimensions["agent_name"]),
    tostring(customDimensions["agent_id"]),
    tostring(props["agent_name"]),
    tostring(props["agent_id"]),
    Name
)
| where agentName has_any ('A1', 'A2', 'A3', 'A4', 'A5', 'A6', 'extractor', 'triage', 'coherence', 'validator', 'inventory', 'communication')
| summarize P95DurationSeconds = percentile(DurationMs, 95) / 1000.0
variables.uploadWebAuthFailureQuery:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(5m)
| where AppRoleName has 'upload-web'
| where toint(ResultCode) in (401, 403)
| summarize AuthFailures = count()

properties.description: Critical alert when the application emits a processing error-rate metric above 5% for 15 minutes.
Warning alert when the extraccion-in queue depth remains above 100 messages.
Warning alert when the pending HITL backlog older than 24 hours exceeds 50 reviews.
Detect repeated Business Central MCP connection failures.
Detect Document Intelligence timeout rates above 10% over the last 15 minutes.
Detect p95 agent processing times above 60 seconds across A1-A6.
Critical: Upload Web 5xx error rate exceeds 5% over 15 minutes.
Warning: Upload Web session abandonment rate exceeds 20% over 1 hour.
Warning: Upload Web auth failures exceed 10 in 5 minutes (possible brute force).

metadata.description: Azure-managed sender domain for HITL email.
HITL web form container app id.
